core_mechanism: nonlinear mode coupling in a memory-bearing (fractional-order) nonlinear dynamical system that self-organizes the steady-state spectrum into a frequency comb — discrete, equally spaced, phase-coherent spectral lines — emerging only above a critical threshold in the control parameters and giving way to chaos beyond it
brief_reason: The abstract attributes equally spaced, phase-coherent spectral lines to nonlinear mode coupling in a fractional-order dynamical system, with the comb appearing only when the fractional-order exponents exceed critical threshold values and transitioning to chaos at still higher values.
